LanguageData.R4_RecycleDesc: Designate items for recycling. A colonist will break them down at a workbench to recover materials.
LanguageData.R4_MustDesignateRecyclable: Must designate a recyclable item (weapon or apparel).
LanguageData.R4_RepairDesc: Designate damaged items for repair. A colonist will restore HP at a workbench, consuming materials. Items with minor damage are mended for free.
LanguageData.R4_MustDesignateRepairable: Must designate a damaged weapon or apparel.
LanguageData.R4_CleanDesc: Designate tainted apparel for cleaning. A colonist will remove the corpse taint at a workbench, consuming some materials.
LanguageData.R4_RecycleDesc_Short: Break down this item to recover materials at a workbench.
LanguageData.R4_RepairDesc_Short: Restore this item's HP at a workbench, consuming repair materials each cycle.
LanguageData.R4_CleanDesc_Short: Remove corpse taint from this item at a workbench.
LanguageData.R4_Desc_MinorMending: Minor damage — will be mended for free.
LanguageData.R4_RepairItemDestroyed: {0} was destroyed during a failed repair attempt.
LanguageData.R4_RepairNoMaterials: Not enough materials to continue repairing {0}.
LanguageData.R4_Settings_RecycleMult_Tip: Scales all recycled material yields. 100% = default. Higher values return more materials; lower values return less.
LanguageData.R4_Settings_SkipIntricate_Tip: If enabled, intricate components are excluded from recycle returns.
LanguageData.R4_Settings_MinorMendingThreshold_Tip: Items at or above this HP fraction are repaired for free without consuming repair materials.
LanguageData.R4_Settings_DebugLogging_Tip: Writes verbose [R4] messages to the log. Useful for diagnosing routing and cost issues. Leave off during normal play.
